description: Current active-session posture from bounded MnT detail collection, alongside clearly separated bounded-window posture reporting from Data Connect. Cisco ISE 3.3 Patch 11.

panels.title: Active Posture Dataset (MnT)
panels.description: Availability of the bounded current active-session posture snapshot.

panels.title: Historical Posture Dataset (Data Connect)
panels.description: Availability of the configured bounded-window historical assessment views.

panels.title: Active Compliance Share (MnT Sample)
panels.description: Compliant share of collected active endpoints with an explicit compliant or failed posture status. Coverage and truncation panels qualify this bounded sample.

targets.expr: ((100 * sum(ise_mnt_active_posture_endpoints{status=~"(?i)compliant|passed"}) / clamp_min(sum(ise_mnt_active_posture_endpoints{status=~"(?i)compliant|passed|non.?compliant|failed"}), 1)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1)))

(sum(ise_mnt_active_posture_endpoints{status=~"(?i)non.?compliant|failed"}) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1)))

panels.title: MnT Detail Coverage
panels.description: Successful MnT session-detail lookups ÷ selected active endpoints. Fills over cycles as the persistent detail cache warms; a flat low value means the per-cycle refresh budget (mnt_active_posture.max_requests_per_cycle, default 80) cannot keep up with session churn, or active sessions exceed the 1000 selection ceiling. Raise the budget (max 250) or refresh TTL; see Exporter Health for the trend.

panels.title: MnT Detail Truncated
panels.description: TRUNCATED means the number of currently active sessions exceeded the configured selection ceiling (mnt_active_posture.max_sessions, capped at 1000), so posture detail was collected for only the first 1000 active endpoints and the compliance sample above is a subset of all active sessions. COMPLETE means every active session was in scope.

panels.title: Active Secure Client / Posture Agent Versions (MnT)

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (agent_version) (ise_mnt_active_secure_client_endpoints)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1))

panels.title: MnT Source Field Coverage
panels.description: Fraction of successfully collected active endpoint details containing each posture source field.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (os) (ise_mnt_active_posture_endpoints)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1))

panels.title: Active Posture Policies: Passed vs Failed (MnT)
panels.description: Policy results parsed from PostureReport for the bounded active endpoint sample.

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (policy, result) (ise_mnt_active_posture_policy_results)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1))

topk(20, sum by (policy) (ise_mnt_active_posture_policy_results{result=~"(?i)fail(ed)?"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="mnt_active_posture",source="mnt"}) == 1))

panels.title: Historical Posture Reporting — Data Connect (Two-Day Views)
Historical Compliance Ratio (Data Connect)
panels.description: Exact latest-assessment compliance ratio in the bounded reporting view; not current active-session state.

panels.title: Historical Assessed Endpoints by Policy (Data Connect)
panels.description: Distinct endpoints (not per-condition hits) by posture policy result, and by posture enforcement result. Each endpoint is counted once by its latest assessment.

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (policy, status) (ise_dataconnect_posture_endpoint_assessments)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(sum by (enforcement_type, enforcement_status, posture_status) (ise_dataconnect_posture_enforcement_assessments)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Historical Failed Conditions (Data Connect)
panels.description: Distinct endpoints failing each posture policy condition — the value column is endpoints, not condition-hit counts. No rows means the dedicated condition view is empty or has no failed conditions; consult Data Quality row counts before reading it as zero failures.

panels.title: Historical Posture Failure Work Queue (Data Connect)
panels.description: No rows can mean the dedicated failure view is empty; dataset availability and Data Quality source-row panels remain authoritative.

panels.title: Historical Assessments by Agent Version (Data Connect)

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (agent_version) (ise_dataconnect_posture_endpoint_assessments)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

topk(20, sum by (os) (ise_dataconnect_posture_endpoint_assessments)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_posture",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Fleet Posture Coverage (accumulated)
panels.description: Accumulated distinct assessed endpoints divided by posture-applicable endpoints. Unlike the 6h re-assessment rate, this keeps each endpoint's latest assessment and climbs toward the whole fleet over 24-48h. Empty unless endpoint_fleet.enabled is on.

panels.title: Fleet Compliance (accumulated)
panels.description: Compliant fraction of accumulated endpoints in an explicit compliant-or-failed posture state across the whole retained fleet.

panels.title: Fleet Assessed vs Eligible
panels.description: Accumulated assessed endpoints and the posture-applicable denominator over time. The gap is the not-yet-accumulated backlog; it shrinks as endpoints re-posture.

panels.title: Fleet Posture by Status
panels.description: Accumulated endpoints by latest posture status.

panels.title: Fleet Assessments by OS
panels.description: Accumulated endpoints by latest operating system.

panels.title: Fleet Secure Client Agent Versions
panels.description: Accumulated endpoints by latest Secure Client posture-agent version.

panels.title: Fleet Assessments by Policy
panels.description: Accumulated endpoints by latest matched posture policy.

panels.title: Fleet Assessments by PSN
panels.description: Accumulated endpoints by the ISE node that recorded their latest assessment.

panels.title: Fleet Cache Freshness
panels.description: Rows retained in the accumulated endpoint fleet cache and the age of the oldest still-retained assessment (bounded by the configured retention).

panels.title: Posture Assessment Rate per PSN
panels.description: Posture assessment throughput per PSN and status from the incremental posture id-tail counter over $__rate_interval. This is the assessment event rate, distinct from the endpoint coverage/compliance panels. Requires dataconnect.posture_event_counters.

targets.expr: sum by (psn, status) (rate(ise_dataconnect_posture_assessment_tail_total[$__rate_interval])) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_posture_counters",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_posture_counters",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))
